exercises.code:
def normalize_phone(p: str) -> str:
    return ''.join(c for c in p if c.isdigit())

print('H1: el filtro isdigit elimina + y espacios del prefijo')
exp1 = normalize_phone('+51 999')
print('exp1', exp1, 'fail' if not exp1.startswith('51') else 'ok_digits_only')
print('H2: debería conservar +51 si la política es E.164')
print('exp2: comparar con entrada que solo tiene dígitos 51999 →', normalize_phone('51999'))
print('resultado: H1 confirmada (bug come +); H2 exige política documentada')
exercises.justification_from_packet: Theory hypothesis experiments; phone bug eats + via isdigit filter.
Theory regression test; particles de/del/la not title-cased.

exercises.code:
import logging, io
buf = io.StringIO()
log = logging.getLogger('pipeline.demo')
log.handlers.clear()
log.setLevel(logging.INFO)
h = logging.StreamHandler(buf)
h.setFormatter(logging.Formatter('%(levelname)s %(message)s'))
log.addHandler(h)
log.propagate = False
log.info('stage=ingest event=start')
print(buf.getvalue().strip())
exercises.justification_from_packet: Demo logger module + structured stage fields.

exercises.code:
import logging, io
buf = io.StringIO()
log = logging.getLogger('cli')
log.handlers.clear()
log.setLevel(logging.INFO)
h = logging.StreamHandler(buf)
log.addHandler(h)
log.propagate = False

def cli_stub_good(n):
    log.info('stage=cli event=start')
    result = n + 1
    log.info('stage=cli event=done')
    print(f'RESULT={result}')

cli_stub_good(2)
print('LOGS:', buf.getvalue().strip())
exercises.justification_from_packet: Hints: progress to logger; RESULT on stdout.

exercises.code:
def mask_email(email: str) -> str:
    local, _, domain = email.partition('@')
    return f"{(local[:1] or '*')}***@{domain}" if domain else '***'

def mask_phone(phone: str) -> str:
    digits = ''.join(c for c in phone if c.isdigit())
    return '***' + digits[-4:] if len(digits) >= 4 else '***'

print(mask_email('carlos@ejemplo.pe'))
print(mask_phone('+51 988 777 666'))
exercises.justification_from_packet: Demo/youDo mask helpers exact policies.
Theory correlation_id through layers as argument.
Theory never log full email/phone; use mask helpers only.
